name: Atombit
blog_profile: Atombit operates as a PE-backed experience intelligence group (Palatine Private Equity) with sub-brands Profusion (data analytics) and Amplify Analytix targeting financial services and retail CX. Their methodology centers on proprietary data science and GenAI-powered analytics rather than platform-specific implementations. Delivery model emphasizes managed analytics services and data-driven insights over traditional consulting. Thought leadership themes include AI-augmented customer intelligence, predictive behavioral analytics, and data monetization strategies.

name: Sovanta
blog_profile: Sovanta specializes in the SAP-Qualtrics integration nexus, building AI-powered experience dashboards and actionable feedback loops embedded directly within SAP enterprise workflows. Their methodology bridges operational data (O-data) with experience data (X-data) using SAP BTP and Qualtrics APIs. Delivery model combines custom UX development with SAP consulting, targeting large enterprises running SAP S/4HANA. Thought leadership centers on democratizing experience data within ERP environments, making CX insights actionable for frontline SAP users, and leveraging AI to close the experience gap in real time.

name: New Metrics
blog_profile: New Metrics is the dominant Qualtrics implementation partner in the GCC region, specializing in government and semi-government CX transformation programs. Their methodology emphasizes CX maturity frameworks, citizen experience measurement, and national-level experience program design aligned with Saudi Vision 2030 and UAE government excellence programs. Delivery model combines Qualtrics platform implementation with strategic CX consulting and Arabic-language program localization. Thought leadership themes include public sector CX benchmarking, digital government experience transformation, and CX governance frameworks.

name: Ipsos CX
blog_profile: Ipsos CX leverages the global research firm's massive scale to deliver enterprise CX advisory services anchored by proprietary research methodologies, global benchmarking databases, and advanced analytics capabilities. Their approach integrates primary research (surveys, ethnography, behavioral data) with CX program design and Medallia platform expertise. Delivery model spans CX strategy consulting, program management, and ongoing measurement-as-a-service. Thought leadership themes include loyalty economics, experience ROI quantification, sector-specific CX benchmarks, and the intersection of brand and customer experience.

name: commonFont
blog_profile: commonFont is a US-based Qualtrics Platinum Partner specializing in enterprise XM program design and implementation, with strong vertical expertise in banking, financial services, and healthcare. Their methodology combines Qualtrics platform technical implementation with strategic CX program architecture, emphasizing closed-loop feedback systems and executive dashboard design. Delivery model spans full lifecycle from program strategy through platform configuration, integration, and ongoing optimization. Thought leadership themes include banking CX transformation, AI-powered experience analytics within Qualtrics, and operationalizing Voice of Customer at enterprise scale.

name: Higher Oak
blog_profile: Higher Oak is a UK/EU-based Qualtrics Platinum Partner focused on enterprise experience management program design and implementation. Their methodology emphasizes research-grade survey design, advanced Qualtrics platform configuration, and integration with enterprise tech stacks. Delivery model includes both project-based implementations and managed services. Blog content has historically covered Qualtrics tips, XM best practices, and European CX trends, though publishing cadence has been notably low in recent months.

name: Lukkap
blog_profile: Lukkap is a Spain-headquartered CX and EX consultancy operating across Spain, Argentina, Peru, and Portugal with a platform-agnostic, methodology-driven approach. Their framework emphasizes customer journey mapping, experience design, and organizational transformation as interconnected disciplines. Delivery model is pure consulting without technology platform lock-in, focusing on strategic advisory, journey redesign, and change management. Thought leadership themes include the employee-customer experience link, journey-centric transformation, and experience-driven business strategy in Spanish-speaking markets.

name: Izo
blog_profile: Izo is a leading Iberoamerican CX consultancy with Qualtrics certification operating across 15+ Spanish-speaking markets from its base in Spain. Their methodology integrates Voice of Customer program design, CX strategy development, and digital experience optimization within a structured maturity framework. Delivery model combines strategic CX consulting with Qualtrics platform implementation services, offering both advisory and technical capabilities. Thought leadership themes include CX governance, customer-centric culture transformation, journey analytics, and sector-specific CX benchmarking across Latin American and Iberian markets.

name: Globant
blog_profile: Globant's Connected Experiences Studio sits within a large-scale global technology services company (+29,000 employees) delivering engineering-led CX transformation. Their approach is technology-first, leveraging proprietary AI platforms, design studios, and deep engineering capabilities to build custom digital experiences rather than implementing third-party XM platforms. Delivery model emphasizes agile engineering teams, design thinking, and AI augmentation at scale. Thought leadership themes center on AI engineering for CX, connected commerce, digital product development, and enterprise-grade experience platforms, with strong banking and retail vertical presence.

name: GemSeek
blog_profile: GemSeek fue absorbida por Accenture Song. Su propuesta original era analytics de CX con foco en predicción de churn y modelado de lealtad — un enfoque data science-first dentro del espacio CX. Sin actividad independiente desde la adquisición.

name: Vocé Group
blog_profile: No verifiable information available. Digital footprint remains non-existent across all monitored channels. Unable to assess methodology, AI stance, or delivery model.

name: Zill Consulting
blog_profile: No verifiable information available. Digital footprint remains non-existent across all monitored channels. Unable to assess methodology, AI stance, or delivery model.

name: Act XM
blog_profile: No verifiable information available. Digital footprint remains non-existent across all monitored channels. Unable to assess methodology, AI stance, or delivery model.

name: Acceleration Strategy
blog_profile: Acceleration Strategy is a Canada/US-based Qualtrics partner specializing in enterprise XM program strategy and implementation, with notable case references in financial services, gaming (OLG), airlines (WestJet), and technology (CrowdStrike). Their methodology emphasizes strategic XM program design linked to business outcomes, with deep Qualtrics platform expertise spanning EX and CX. Delivery model focuses on mid-to-large enterprise engagements combining strategy consulting with hands-on Qualtrics implementation. Their Canadian market position provides differentiated access to Canadian banking, government, and enterprise clients.
